layout_policy: single shared layout; theme may only change visual styling and asset variants. Bounding boxes are identical for light and dark.

assets.notes: Hexagonal brand mark with stylized 'M'/Huddle glyph. Same position in light and dark. The wordmark 'HUDDLE DMZ PORTAL' next to it is functional_text and is NOT cropped.
Group of penguins inside an igloo holding the Huddle shield. Light variant has snowy/icy scene; dark variant has glowing fire/ember scene. Same composition and placement.
Hero illustration to the right of the welcome heading. Three penguins on an iceberg at sunrise/sunset. Light = pastel daybreak; dark = orange ember sunset. Same composition.

Decorative left-side artwork inside the footer CTA banner. Light variant shows two penguins flanking a Huddle shield. Dark variant only shows the Huddle shield mark (no penguins) in the same slot — layout slot is preserved; only the rendered artwork differs. Reported under layout_mismatches.

Decorative right-side artwork inside the footer CTA banner. Light variant shows an igloo with a Huddle flag on snow. Dark variant shows a pair of penguins on a rock at sunset. Same bbox slot; content differs by theme. Reported under layout_mismatches.
Circular profile photo for 'Alex Morgan'. Same position in both themes. The name and role text next to it is functional_text and is NOT cropped.

functional_text_regions.notes: Real text, theme via CSS color tokens
Real text. Orange highlight color via CSS.
Real text plus 👋 emoji glyph (not an image).

functional_text_regions.text: Everything looks secure. Keep building amazing things.

functional_text_regions.notes: Box, shield, Docker whale, and warning triangle inside the four stat cards. Implement as icon font / inline SVG, not raster crops.

functional_text_regions.text: Huddle together. Build boldly. We've got your back.
Secure dev environments in the DMZ.

layout_mismatches.description: Light theme renders two penguins + shield in this slot; dark theme renders only the shield mark. Same bbox is preserved; theme variant assets differ in content. Treat as decorative variation, not a structural change.

Light theme renders an igloo+flag; dark theme renders two penguins on a rock at sunset. Same bbox is preserved; theme variant assets differ in content. Treat as decorative variation, not a structural change.

Dark screenshot rendered the topbar avatar a few pixels left/up of the light screenshot, so the canonical (light) bbox crops the dark avatar slightly off-center and includes part of the adjacent notification bell. Implementation should ignore this source-asset drift and render a single circular avatar at the canonical position; do not author two layouts.
